aiTitle: 搜尋 CLAUDE.md 中與 SPEC.md 相關段落

content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>請幫我在 CLAUDE.md 裡搜尋所有跟 SPEC.md 相關的段落，包含更新機制、維護規則、觸發條件等。把找到的原文完整列出來，不要省略。</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-18</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Claude's Full Response to User:
全部讀取完成。以下是完整彙整回報。

---

# 📋 uk_slot_template 專案完整調查報告

## 1️⃣ CLAUDE.md — 開發方法論與 Workflow（v7.0.0 workflow-first）

CLAUDE.md 已完整在我的 context 中。核心是一套 **workflow-first 的開發紀律方法論**，重點如下：

### 任務分級 → 編排路徑（最高優先級約束）

收到非微小任務時**禁止直接寫碼**，先判定等級：

| 等級 | 條件 | 編排路徑 |
|------|------|---------|
| **微小** | < 50 行 · 單檔 · 設定調整 · 「快速修改」 | 直接執行（仍受 always-on hook 護欄）|
| **中型** | 單一函式/元件 · 1-3 檔 · < 300 行 | 輕量流程：設計自檢→實作→審查→測試→迷你追溯（可選 `/dev-review`）|
| **大型** | 新模組/功能 · (≥ 3 檔或 ≥ 300 行) 且多交互子系統 | **開 workflow**：`/dev-design` → 實作 → `/dev-review` →（可選）`/dev-verify` |
| **PRD/架構設計** | 需求未定 / 多方案取捨 / 系統級設計 | **強制開 workflow**：`/dev-prd` 或 `/dev-design` |

### 四個可用 workflow（slash command）

| 指令 | 用途 | 結構 |
|------|------|------|
| `/dev-prd` | PRD / 需求探索 | 多角度探索(problem/user/scope)→塑形候選(lean/complete)→對抗挑戰→PRD 文件 |
| `/dev-design` | 架構設計 | 多方案架構 → adversarial-verify 砍缺陷 → 設計規格(含 BC-x) |
| `/dev-review` | 品質+安全審查 | parallel(correctness/security/repro)→ 對抗驗證 findings |
| `/dev-verify` | 跨產出物自證(可選) | 可枚舉項 adversarial-verify + 反向遍歷找死碼/未實作 |

### 承重核（always-on，不依賴 workflow）

- **因果鏈分析（Section 7）**：PreToolUse Hook 強制觸發。每次首改某檔，Hook (`impact-analysis-guard.sh`) 阻擋並要求輸出「根因→呼叫者(grep 窮舉)→隱性風險→決策」。
- **事實求證（Section 11）**：對「X 是 Y」確定語氣的斷言需分級證據（🟢A級檔:行 / 🟡B級間接 / 🔴反例檢查）。
- **Push back 義務（Section 11.5）**：5 條白名單情境必須主動反對用戶。

### 退化路徑（Section 14）

workflow 不可用時方法論不崩，主 agent inline 走「設計→自審→實作→審查→測試→追溯」，並標記「⚠️ workflow 不可用，走退化路徑」。

> ⚠️ 注意 CLAUDE.md 自身的**誠實校準**：它明確記載「五階 ritual 對 correctness 軸實證零增益」，承重核的價值定位錨在「人軸便利」而非已證實的正確性增益。

---

## 2️⃣ SPEC.md — 遊戲規格書模板（完整）

### 基本資訊
- **用途**：UK Slot 系列所有衍生遊戲的 **fork 來源模板**
- **技術棧**：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + astarte-framework
- **設計解析度**：1136×640（橫）/ 640×1136（直）

### 預設盤面
- 列數 6 / 行數 5 / 符號 96×82 / 21 種符號
- **2 種 Preset**：`Standard`(plateCount=3，凹字型可視) / `DropEntry`(plateCount=1，掉入式)

### 三種轉輪策略（FillStrategy）

| 策略 | 枚舉 | 行為 | 狀態流 | 類別 |
|------|------|------|--------|------|
| **Standard** | 0 | 整列轉→逐列停→報獎 | `SPIN→EFFECT_START→AWARD` | 無 |
| **Cascade** | 1 | 消除→存活天降→頂部補入→循環 | `SPIN→EFFECT_START→[EXPLODE↔MATCHING_PATCH_UP]*→AWARD` | `CascadeFillStrategy`(繼承 `BaseDropFillStrategy`) |
| **Tumble** | 2 | 所有符號同時重力掉落，較快 | 同 Cascade | `TumbleFillStrategy`(繼承 `BaseDropFillStrategy`) |

- Cascade 掉落公式：`dropTimePerCell × 掉落格數`
- Tumble 掉落公式：`baseDropTime × 掉落格數 / visibleCount`（常搭乘倍累加）

### 模板內建基礎功能
完整狀態機(20+狀態)、Free Game、Buy Bonus(CommonBuyBonus)、NearWin 聽牌、BigWin(BigWinControll)、AudioManager、斷線重連(RecoverSpinAck)、橫直版自適應、PrefabPoolManager 物件池、ReelDevTool、Spine 封裝、NumberAnimation、FrameAnimation、Protobuf 通訊、多語系、GameIntroManager、按停快停。

### 擴充點（衍生遊戲覆寫）

| 擴充點 | 位置 |
|--------|------|
| Symbol 枚舉 | `Game_Define.ts` |
| FillStrategy 子類化 | `FillStrategy/` |
| SetSpinMode | `SlotReels.ts` |
| ReelLayoutConfig | `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` |
| GameState 擴充 | `GameState/`（註冊到 `SetStateMachine()`）|
| CheckState/EffectStartState/AwardState 分流 | 各對應檔 |
| Protocol 替換 | `GameView.ts` import 區 |
| COL/ROW 常數 | `Game_Define.ts` |

### 衍生遊戲典型步驟
1. Fork repo → 2. 替換 proto import → 3. 改 Symbol 枚舉 → 4. 選 SpinMode + ReelLayout Preset → 5. 擴充 GameState → 6. 替換美術 → 7. 自訂 FillStrategy 子類 → 8. 調整 Game_Define 常數

### 架構設計重點
狀態機驅動(update→Tick→OnEnter/OnProcess/OnLeave)、策略模式解耦(FillStrategy+EntryStrategy 經 SetSpinMode runtime 切換)、BaseDropFillStrategy 三階段(存活下沉→新符天降→RearrangeSingleCells 重排索引不可省)、getFixedNode 座標、Reset 語義防 await hang、DevTool console 指令。

---

## 3️⃣ assets 目錄第一層

```
assets/
├── game/          ← 美術與資源
│   ├── Animation/  features/  Img/  Prefab/  Sound/  Text/  (+Fnt/Material/Spine meta)
├── Scene/
│   └── MainGame.scene   ← 唯一場景（git status 顯示有未提交修改）
└── Script/        ← 核心程式碼
    ├── Audio/  Common/  FillStrategy/  GameState/  Spine/   (子目錄)
    ├── GameView.ts          ← 主控（狀態機註冊/Protocol/生命週期）
    ├── SlotReels.ts         ← 轉輪核心
    ├── Game_Define.ts       ← 全域常數/Symbol枚舉/GameState枚舉
    ├── ReelLayoutConfig.ts  ← 盤面結構配置
    ├── ColumnSymbol.ts  SingleCell.ts
    ├── RecoverSpinAck.ts    ← 斷線重連
    ├── ReelDevTool.ts       ← console 測試工具
    └── GameIntroManager.ts
```

---

## 4️⃣ Tools_SlotSetUP 目錄（衍生遊戲起手工具）

這是一個 **獨立 git repo 的子工具**，用來 clone 外部依賴（framework extensions + proto）。

```
Tools_SlotSetUP/
├── FirstClone.bat / FirstClone_py3.bat   ← 首次 clone
├── Update.bat / Update_py3.bat           ← 更新
├── gitClone.bat
├── gameSetting.json                       ← 設定要 clone 的 git repo
├── README.md
└── src/
    ├── FirstCheckOut.py
    └── Update.py
```

### README.md（完整）
**環境建置**：
1. 把 `gameSetting.json` 複製到遊戲資料夾根目錄並加入版控
2. 調整 `gameSetting.json` 內 Proto 的 git 路徑和 branch（用 default 則 branch 放空字串）
3. 執行 `FirstClone.bat` 進行 clone
4. 確認 `extensions` 和 `assets/game/Script/Proto` 內有東西
5. 完成

**更新**：執行 `Update.bat` 即可

### gameSetting.json（完整）
```json
{
  "Setting": [
    { "git": "git@github.com:OLD-RD1/slotExtensions-client.git", "branch": "", "folder": "extensions" },
    { "git": "git@github.com:OLD-RD1/thor-proto.git", "branch": "", "folder": "assets/game/Script/Proto" }
  ]
}
```
→ clone 兩個外部 repo：**framework extensions**(到 `extensions`) 與 **proto**(到 `assets/game/Script/Proto`)。衍生新遊戲時這裡的 `thor-proto` 要換成各遊戲自己的 proto。

---

## 5️⃣ .claude 目錄（workflow 與 hook 設定）

### ⚠️ 重要發現：workflow 腳本在「全域」不在「專案」

- 專案 `.claude/` **沒有** `workflows/` 目錄
- 四個 workflow 腳本實際位於 **`~/.claude/workflows/`**（全域，2026-06-03 部署）：
  - `dev-prd.js` (4866 B) / `dev-design.js` (6835 B) / `dev-review.js` (4908 B) / `dev-verify.js` (5753 B)

> 這與 CLAUDE.md 寫的「腳本部署於 `.claude/workflows/`(git-tracked)」**不一致** — 實際只在全域、未進專案版控。意味著別人 fork 此 repo 不會自動拿到這些 workflow（需自行部署全域）。

### 專案 `.claude/` 結構（只有 hooks）

```
.claude/
├── settings.json
└── hooks/
    ├── impact-analysis-guard.sh     ← 因果鏈閘門（承重核·阻擋式）
    ├── prompt-understanding-guard.sh ← 理解確認閘門
    ├── delegation-gate.sh            ← 委派前因果鏈閘門
    ├── delegation-tracker.sh
    ├── incremental-lint.sh           ← 改檔後增量 lint
    ├── learning-log-checker.sh
    └── _helpers.sh
```

### settings.json hook 註冊（完整）

| 時機 | matcher | hook |
|------|---------|------|
| **PreToolUse** | `Write\|Edit\|MultiEdit` | `impact-analysis-guard.sh`（因果鏈阻擋）|
| **PreToolUse** | `Agent` | `delegation-gate.sh`（委派閘門）|
| **PostToolUse** | `Write\|Edit\|MultiEdit` | `incremental-lint.sh` |
| **PostToolUse** | `Agent` | `delegation-tracker.sh` |
| **PostToolUse** | `Bash` | `learning-log-checker.sh` |
| **UserPromptSubmit** | (全部) | `prompt-understanding-guard.sh` |

### 四個 workflow 腳本內容摘要

**`dev-prd.js`** — Discover(3 並行 agent: problem/user/scope) → Shape(2 候選: lean/complete) → Challenge(1 對抗審查) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/PRD.md`)。每個 agent 注入「事實求證」紀律。

**`dev-design.js`** — Explore(1 探索 agent，schema 含 factClaims) → Propose(3 並行: mvp-first/robustness-first/simplicity-first，schema 含 behaviorContracts/rippleImpact) → Adversarial(每方案派 skeptic + judge-panel 評分) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md`)。每 agent 注入「承重核」(事實求證+因果鏈+誠實邊界)。

**`dev-review.js`** — Review(3 並行 lens: correctness/security/repro-quality) → Verify(每個 high/medium finding 派**獨立 context skeptic 反駁**，打破同源天花板 #007) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/P3-review.md`，verdict: pass/fix-required/needs-attention)。

**`dev-verify.js`** — Enumerate(枚舉所有 BC-x 當「分母」) → Forward Verify(每 BC-x 派 skeptic 證明「未覆蓋」) → Reverse Traverse(反向找死碼/未實作/範圍蔓延，這是 adversarial-verify 結構上蓋不到的) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/P5-verify.md`)。**特別設計**：分母=0 時強制判 fix-required，嚴禁因「無未覆蓋項」誤判 pass。

---

## 6️⃣ uk-slot-state-machine.skill 檔案

### 檔案本質
- 是一個 **ZIP archive**（25536 B，2026-05-20 打包）— 即「發佈用 zip」
- **SOT（真實來源）在 `.kiro/skills/uk-slot-state-machine/`**（依你的記憶 `project_skill_workflow.md`，根目錄 `.skill` 是發佈用 zip）

### zip 內含 24 個檔案
```
uk-slot-state-machine/
├── SKILL.md                    (5680 B)
├── references/states.md        (12725 B)  ← 19 狀態完整說明
└── assets/GameState/           ← 19 個狀態模板 .ts
    AddFreeState / AwardState / CheckJpState / CheckState / CoinState /
    EffectStartState / EnterFreeState / ExplodeState / FeatureShowState /
    FullRewardState / IdleState / LeaveFreeState / MatchingPatchUpState /
    PlateShowState / RoundEndState / RoundShowEndState / ScatterShowState /
    SpinState / UnshowPrepareState / WaitReadyState / WaitResState
```

### SKILL.md 完整內容（狀態機設定指南）

**檔案位置**：`assets/Script/GameView.ts` → 私有方法 `SetStateMachine()`

**標準狀態機模板**（分組註冊）：
```typescript
private SetStateMachine() {
    let states = {};
    // ── 框架通用狀態（CommonState）──
    states[ CommonState.WAIT_RES ]    = new WaitResState( this );
    states[ CommonState.IDLE ]        = new IdleState( this );
    states[ CommonState.SPIN ]        = new SpinState( this );
    states[ CommonState.CHECK_STATE ] = new CheckState( this );
    // ── 遊戲流程狀態 ──
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.WAIT_READY ]     = new WaitReadyState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.PLATE_SHOW ]     = new PlateShowState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.FEATURE_SHOW ]   = new FeatureShowState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.UNSHOW_PREPARE ] = new UnshowPrepareState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.AWARD ]          = new AwardState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END ] = new RoundShowEndState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_END ]      = new RoundEndState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.EFFECT_START ]   = new EffectStartState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.SCATTER_SHOW ]   = new ScatterShowState( this );
    // ── 免費遊戲狀態 ──
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ENTER_FREE ]  = new EnterFreeState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.FULL_REWARD ] = new FullRewardState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ADD_FREE ]    = new AddFreeState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.LEAVE_FREE ]  = new LeaveFreeState( this );
    // ── 消除補位狀態（Cascade/Tumble）──
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.EXPLODE ]           = new ExplodeState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP ] = new MatchingPatchUpState( this );
    // ── 選用狀態 ──
    // states[ Game_Define.GameState.CHECK_JP ] = new CheckJpState( this );  // Jackpot
    stateManager.Init( states );
    stateManager.NextState( CommonState.LOGIN );  // 固定起點，勿移除
}
```

**5 條規則**：
1. `stateManager.NextState(CommonState.LOGIN)` 是初始觸發點，**不可移除**
2. 新增自訂狀態前先在 `Game_Define.ts` 的 `GAMEVIEW_STATE` 列舉新增 Key
3. 新增狀態檔後在 `GameView.ts` 頂部補 `import`
4. `CHECK_JP` 等選用狀態預設註解停用，需要時取消註解別刪
5. 狀態切換一律透過 `stateManager.NextState(...)`，不直接操作狀態物件

**新增自訂狀態 5 步驟**：複製最近模板 → 改類名/@ccclass/log字串 → Game_Define 加 Key → GameView 加 import → SetStateMachine 加註冊。

**相關 skill**：`reel-fill-strategy`（消除補位策略 Cascade/Tumble + 進場策略 DropEntry）。`.kiro/skills/` 下另有 `reel-fill-strategy` skill。

---

## 🔑 整體理解：如何用此模板實作新老虎機

把以上拼起來，新遊戲的開發路徑是：

1. **起手**：Fork repo → 用 `Tools_SlotSetUP`(改 `gameSetting.json` 換 proto) → `FirstClone.bat` 拉 framework + proto
2. **規劃**（若需求未定）：`/dev-prd` → `/dev-design`（產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/` 設計規格含 BC-x）
3. **實作**（依 SPEC.md 擴充點）：改 `Game_Define.ts`(Symbol/COL/ROW) → 選 SpinMode + ReelLayout Preset → 用 **uk-slot-state-machine skill** 擴充 `SetStateMachine()` → 用 **reel-fill-strategy skill** 自訂補位特效 → 替換美術
4. **審查驗證**：`/dev-review` → `/dev-verify`
5. **全程**受 always-on hooks 約束（改碼前因果鏈閘門、改碼後 lint）

需要我接著針對「實作新老虎機」做更具體的步驟規劃（例如開 `/dev-prd` 或 `/dev-design`），還是先看某個具體檔案（如 `Game_Define.ts`、`GameView.ts` 或 `reel-fill-strategy` skill）的內容？

Respond in this XML format:
<summary>
  <request>[Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done]</request>
  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>
  <notes>[Additional insights or observations about the current progress]</notes>
</summary>

IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>請幫我在 CLAUDE.md 裡搜尋所有跟 SPEC.md 相關的段落，包含更新機制、維護規則、觸發條件等。把找到的原文完整列出來，不要省略。</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-18</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Claude's Full Response to User:
全部讀取完成。以下是完整彙整回報。

---

# 📋 uk_slot_template 專案完整調查報告

## 1️⃣ CLAUDE.md — 開發方法論與 Workflow（v7.0.0 workflow-first）

CLAUDE.md 已完整在我的 context 中。核心是一套 **workflow-first 的開發紀律方法論**，重點如下：

### 任務分級 → 編排路徑（最高優先級約束）

收到非微小任務時**禁止直接寫碼**，先判定等級：

| 等級 | 條件 | 編排路徑 |
|------|------|---------|
| **微小** | < 50 行 · 單檔 · 設定調整 · 「快速修改」 | 直接執行（仍受 always-on hook 護欄）|
| **中型** | 單一函式/元件 · 1-3 檔 · < 300 行 | 輕量流程：設計自檢→實作→審查→測試→迷你追溯（可選 `/dev-review`）|
| **大型** | 新模組/功能 · (≥ 3 檔或 ≥ 300 行) 且多交互子系統 | **開 workflow**：`/dev-design` → 實作 → `/dev-review` →（可選）`/dev-verify` |
| **PRD/架構設計** | 需求未定 / 多方案取捨 / 系統級設計 | **強制開 workflow**：`/dev-prd` 或 `/dev-design` |

### 四個可用 workflow（slash command）

| 指令 | 用途 | 結構 |
|------|------|------|
| `/dev-prd` | PRD / 需求探索 | 多角度探索(problem/user/scope)→塑形候選(lean/complete)→對抗挑戰→PRD 文件 |
| `/dev-design` | 架構設計 | 多方案架構 → adversarial-verify 砍缺陷 → 設計規格(含 BC-x) |
| `/dev-review` | 品質+安全審查 | parallel(correctness/security/repro)→ 對抗驗證 findings |
| `/dev-verify` | 跨產出物自證(可選) | 可枚舉項 adversarial-verify + 反向遍歷找死碼/未實作 |

### 承重核（always-on，不依賴 workflow）

- **因果鏈分析（Section 7）**：PreToolUse Hook 強制觸發。每次首改某檔，Hook (`impact-analysis-guard.sh`) 阻擋並要求輸出「根因→呼叫者(grep 窮舉)→隱性風險→決策」。
- **事實求證（Section 11）**：對「X 是 Y」確定語氣的斷言需分級證據（🟢A級檔:行 / 🟡B級間接 / 🔴反例檢查）。
- **Push back 義務（Section 11.5）**：5 條白名單情境必須主動反對用戶。

### 退化路徑（Section 14）

workflow 不可用時方法論不崩，主 agent inline 走「設計→自審→實作→審查→測試→追溯」，並標記「⚠️ workflow 不可用，走退化路徑」。

> ⚠️ 注意 CLAUDE.md 自身的**誠實校準**：它明確記載「五階 ritual 對 correctness 軸實證零增益」，承重核的價值定位錨在「人軸便利」而非已證實的正確性增益。

---

## 2️⃣ SPEC.md — 遊戲規格書模板（完整）

### 基本資訊
- **用途**：UK Slot 系列所有衍生遊戲的 **fork 來源模板**
- **技術棧**：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + astarte-framework
- **設計解析度**：1136×640（橫）/ 640×1136（直）

### 預設盤面
- 列數 6 / 行數 5 / 符號 96×82 / 21 種符號
- **2 種 Preset**：`Standard`(plateCount=3，凹字型可視) / `DropEntry`(plateCount=1，掉入式)

### 三種轉輪策略（FillStrategy）

| 策略 | 枚舉 | 行為 | 狀態流 | 類別 |
|------|------|------|--------|------|
| **Standard** | 0 | 整列轉→逐列停→報獎 | `SPIN→EFFECT_START→AWARD` | 無 |
| **Cascade** | 1 | 消除→存活天降→頂部補入→循環 | `SPIN→EFFECT_START→[EXPLODE↔MATCHING_PATCH_UP]*→AWARD` | `CascadeFillStrategy`(繼承 `BaseDropFillStrategy`) |
| **Tumble** | 2 | 所有符號同時重力掉落，較快 | 同 Cascade | `TumbleFillStrategy`(繼承 `BaseDropFillStrategy`) |

- Cascade 掉落公式：`dropTimePerCell × 掉落格數`
- Tumble 掉落公式：`baseDropTime × 掉落格數 / visibleCount`（常搭乘倍累加）

### 模板內建基礎功能
完整狀態機(20+狀態)、Free Game、Buy Bonus(CommonBuyBonus)、NearWin 聽牌、BigWin(BigWinControll)、AudioManager、斷線重連(RecoverSpinAck)、橫直版自適應、PrefabPoolManager 物件池、ReelDevTool、Spine 封裝、NumberAnimation、FrameAnimation、Protobuf 通訊、多語系、GameIntroManager、按停快停。

### 擴充點（衍生遊戲覆寫）

| 擴充點 | 位置 |
|--------|------|
| Symbol 枚舉 | `Game_Define.ts` |
| FillStrategy 子類化 | `FillStrategy/` |
| SetSpinMode | `SlotReels.ts` |
| ReelLayoutConfig | `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` |
| GameState 擴充 | `GameState/`（註冊到 `SetStateMachine()`）|
| CheckState/EffectStartState/AwardState 分流 | 各對應檔 |
| Protocol 替換 | `GameView.ts` import 區 |
| COL/ROW 常數 | `Game_Define.ts` |

### 衍生遊戲典型步驟
1. Fork repo → 2. 替換 proto import → 3. 改 Symbol 枚舉 → 4. 選 SpinMode + ReelLayout Preset → 5. 擴充 GameState → 6. 替換美術 → 7. 自訂 FillStrategy 子類 → 8. 調整 Game_Define 常數

### 架構設計重點
狀態機驅動(update→Tick→OnEnter/OnProcess/OnLeave)、策略模式解耦(FillStrategy+EntryStrategy 經 SetSpinMode runtime 切換)、BaseDropFillStrategy 三階段(存活下沉→新符天降→RearrangeSingleCells 重排索引不可省)、getFixedNode 座標、Reset 語義防 await hang、DevTool console 指令。

---

## 3️⃣ assets 目錄第一層

```
assets/
├── game/          ← 美術與資源
│   ├── Animation/  features/  Img/  Prefab/  Sound/  Text/  (+Fnt/Material/Spine meta)
├── Scene/
│   └── MainGame.scene   ← 唯一場景（git status 顯示有未提交修改）
└── Script/        ← 核心程式碼
    ├── Audio/  Common/  FillStrategy/  GameState/  Spine/   (子目錄)
    ├── GameView.ts          ← 主控（狀態機註冊/Protocol/生命週期）
    ├── SlotReels.ts         ← 轉輪核心
    ├── Game_Define.ts       ← 全域常數/Symbol枚舉/GameState枚舉
    ├── ReelLayoutConfig.ts  ← 盤面結構配置
    ├── ColumnSymbol.ts  SingleCell.ts
    ├── RecoverSpinAck.ts    ← 斷線重連
    ├── ReelDevTool.ts       ← console 測試工具
    └── GameIntroManager.ts
```

---

## 4️⃣ Tools_SlotSetUP 目錄（衍生遊戲起手工具）

這是一個 **獨立 git repo 的子工具**，用來 clone 外部依賴（framework extensions + proto）。

```
Tools_SlotSetUP/
├── FirstClone.bat / FirstClone_py3.bat   ← 首次 clone
├── Update.bat / Update_py3.bat           ← 更新
├── gitClone.bat
├── gameSetting.json                       ← 設定要 clone 的 git repo
├── README.md
└── src/
    ├── FirstCheckOut.py
    └── Update.py
```

### README.md（完整）
**環境建置**：
1. 把 `gameSetting.json` 複製到遊戲資料夾根目錄並加入版控
2. 調整 `gameSetting.json` 內 Proto 的 git 路徑和 branch（用 default 則 branch 放空字串）
3. 執行 `FirstClone.bat` 進行 clone
4. 確認 `extensions` 和 `assets/game/Script/Proto` 內有東西
5. 完成

**更新**：執行 `Update.bat` 即可

### gameSetting.json（完整）
```json
{
  "Setting": [
    { "git": "git@github.com:OLD-RD1/slotExtensions-client.git", "branch": "", "folder": "extensions" },
    { "git": "git@github.com:OLD-RD1/thor-proto.git", "branch": "", "folder": "assets/game/Script/Proto" }
  ]
}
```
→ clone 兩個外部 repo：**framework extensions**(到 `extensions`) 與 **proto**(到 `assets/game/Script/Proto`)。衍生新遊戲時這裡的 `thor-proto` 要換成各遊戲自己的 proto。

---

## 5️⃣ .claude 目錄（workflow 與 hook 設定）

### ⚠️ 重要發現：workflow 腳本在「全域」不在「專案」

- 專案 `.claude/` **沒有** `workflows/` 目錄
- 四個 workflow 腳本實際位於 **`~/.claude/workflows/`**（全域，2026-06-03 部署）：
  - `dev-prd.js` (4866 B) / `dev-design.js` (6835 B) / `dev-review.js` (4908 B) / `dev-verify.js` (5753 B)

> 這與 CLAUDE.md 寫的「腳本部署於 `.claude/workflows/`(git-tracked)」**不一致** — 實際只在全域、未進專案版控。意味著別人 fork 此 repo 不會自動拿到這些 workflow（需自行部署全域）。

### 專案 `.claude/` 結構（只有 hooks）

```
.claude/
├── settings.json
└── hooks/
    ├── impact-analysis-guard.sh     ← 因果鏈閘門（承重核·阻擋式）
    ├── prompt-understanding-guard.sh ← 理解確認閘門
    ├── delegation-gate.sh            ← 委派前因果鏈閘門
    ├── delegation-tracker.sh
    ├── incremental-lint.sh           ← 改檔後增量 lint
    ├── learning-log-checker.sh
    └── _helpers.sh
```

### settings.json hook 註冊（完整）

| 時機 | matcher | hook |
|------|---------|------|
| **PreToolUse** | `Write\|Edit\|MultiEdit` | `impact-analysis-guard.sh`（因果鏈阻擋）|
| **PreToolUse** | `Agent` | `delegation-gate.sh`（委派閘門）|
| **PostToolUse** | `Write\|Edit\|MultiEdit` | `incremental-lint.sh` |
| **PostToolUse** | `Agent` | `delegation-tracker.sh` |
| **PostToolUse** | `Bash` | `learning-log-checker.sh` |
| **UserPromptSubmit** | (全部) | `prompt-understanding-guard.sh` |

### 四個 workflow 腳本內容摘要

**`dev-prd.js`** — Discover(3 並行 agent: problem/user/scope) → Shape(2 候選: lean/complete) → Challenge(1 對抗審查) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/PRD.md`)。每個 agent 注入「事實求證」紀律。

**`dev-design.js`** — Explore(1 探索 agent，schema 含 factClaims) → Propose(3 並行: mvp-first/robustness-first/simplicity-first，schema 含 behaviorContracts/rippleImpact) → Adversarial(每方案派 skeptic + judge-panel 評分) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md`)。每 agent 注入「承重核」(事實求證+因果鏈+誠實邊界)。

**`dev-review.js`** — Review(3 並行 lens: correctness/security/repro-quality) → Verify(每個 high/medium finding 派**獨立 context skeptic 反駁**，打破同源天花板 #007) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/P3-review.md`，verdict: pass/fix-required/needs-attention)。

**`dev-verify.js`** — Enumerate(枚舉所有 BC-x 當「分母」) → Forward Verify(每 BC-x 派 skeptic 證明「未覆蓋」) → Reverse Traverse(反向找死碼/未實作/範圍蔓延，這是 adversarial-verify 結構上蓋不到的) → Synthesize(產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/P5-verify.md`)。**特別設計**：分母=0 時強制判 fix-required，嚴禁因「無未覆蓋項」誤判 pass。

---

## 6️⃣ uk-slot-state-machine.skill 檔案

### 檔案本質
- 是一個 **ZIP archive**（25536 B，2026-05-20 打包）— 即「發佈用 zip」
- **SOT（真實來源）在 `.kiro/skills/uk-slot-state-machine/`**（依你的記憶 `project_skill_workflow.md`，根目錄 `.skill` 是發佈用 zip）

### zip 內含 24 個檔案
```
uk-slot-state-machine/
├── SKILL.md                    (5680 B)
├── references/states.md        (12725 B)  ← 19 狀態完整說明
└── assets/GameState/           ← 19 個狀態模板 .ts
    AddFreeState / AwardState / CheckJpState / CheckState / CoinState /
    EffectStartState / EnterFreeState / ExplodeState / FeatureShowState /
    FullRewardState / IdleState / LeaveFreeState / MatchingPatchUpState /
    PlateShowState / RoundEndState / RoundShowEndState / ScatterShowState /
    SpinState / UnshowPrepareState / WaitReadyState / WaitResState
```

### SKILL.md 完整內容（狀態機設定指南）

**檔案位置**：`assets/Script/GameView.ts` → 私有方法 `SetStateMachine()`

**標準狀態機模板**（分組註冊）：
```typescript
private SetStateMachine() {
    let states = {};
    // ── 框架通用狀態（CommonState）──
    states[ CommonState.WAIT_RES ]    = new WaitResState( this );
    states[ CommonState.IDLE ]        = new IdleState( this );
    states[ CommonState.SPIN ]        = new SpinState( this );
    states[ CommonState.CHECK_STATE ] = new CheckState( this );
    // ── 遊戲流程狀態 ──
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.WAIT_READY ]     = new WaitReadyState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.PLATE_SHOW ]     = new PlateShowState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.FEATURE_SHOW ]   = new FeatureShowState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.UNSHOW_PREPARE ] = new UnshowPrepareState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.AWARD ]          = new AwardState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END ] = new RoundShowEndState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_END ]      = new RoundEndState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.EFFECT_START ]   = new EffectStartState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.SCATTER_SHOW ]   = new ScatterShowState( this );
    // ── 免費遊戲狀態 ──
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ENTER_FREE ]  = new EnterFreeState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.FULL_REWARD ] = new FullRewardState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.ADD_FREE ]    = new AddFreeState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.LEAVE_FREE ]  = new LeaveFreeState( this );
    // ── 消除補位狀態（Cascade/Tumble）──
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.EXPLODE ]           = new ExplodeState( this );
    states[ Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP ] = new MatchingPatchUpState( this );
    // ── 選用狀態 ──
    // states[ Game_Define.GameState.CHECK_JP ] = new CheckJpState( this );  // Jackpot
    stateManager.Init( states );
    stateManager.NextState( CommonState.LOGIN );  // 固定起點，勿移除
}
```

**5 條規則**：
1. `stateManager.NextState(CommonState.LOGIN)` 是初始觸發點，**不可移除**
2. 新增自訂狀態前先在 `Game_Define.ts` 的 `GAMEVIEW_STATE` 列舉新增 Key
3. 新增狀態檔後在 `GameView.ts` 頂部補 `import`
4. `CHECK_JP` 等選用狀態預設註解停用，需要時取消註解別刪
5. 狀態切換一律透過 `stateManager.NextState(...)`，不直接操作狀態物件

**新增自訂狀態 5 步驟**：複製最近模板 → 改類名/@ccclass/log字串 → Game_Define 加 Key → GameView 加 import → SetStateMachine 加註冊。

**相關 skill**：`reel-fill-strategy`（消除補位策略 Cascade/Tumble + 進場策略 DropEntry）。`.kiro/skills/` 下另有 `reel-fill-strategy` skill。

---

## 🔑 整體理解：如何用此模板實作新老虎機

把以上拼起來，新遊戲的開發路徑是：

1. **起手**：Fork repo → 用 `Tools_SlotSetUP`(改 `gameSetting.json` 換 proto) → `FirstClone.bat` 拉 framework + proto
2. **規劃**（若需求未定）：`/dev-prd` → `/dev-design`（產出 `.claude-loop/artifacts/` 設計規格含 BC-x）
3. **實作**（依 SPEC.md 擴充點）：改 `Game_Define.ts`(Symbol/COL/ROW) → 選 SpinMode + ReelLayout Preset → 用 **uk-slot-state-machine skill** 擴充 `SetStateMachine()` → 用 **reel-fill-strategy skill** 自訂補位特效 → 替換美術
4. **審查驗證**：`/dev-review` → `/dev-verify`
5. **全程**受 always-on hooks 約束（改碼前因果鏈閘門、改碼後 lint）

```xml
<summary>
  <request>Comprehensive search and extraction of SPEC.md-related content from CLAUDE.md and project documentation</request>
  <investigated>Complete project structure documented including CLAUDE.md (v7.0.0 workflow-first methodology), SPEC.md (UK Slot template specification), .claude directory configuration, Tools_SlotSetUP external dependency system, uk-slot-state-machine.skill archive contents, and assets directory organization</investigated>
  <learned>Project uses a workflow-first development discipline with 4-tier task classification (tiny/medium/large/PRD) governing whether to invoke /dev-prd, /dev-design, /dev-review, or /dev-verify workflows. SPEC.md defines a Cocos Creator 3.6.2 template for UK Slot games with 3 FillStrategies (Standard/Cascade/Tumble), 19+ state machine states, and clear extension points for derived games. Critical discrepancy discovered: workflow scripts (dev-prd.js, dev-design.js, dev-review.js, dev-verify.js) are deployed globally at ~/.claude/workflows/ rather than in project .claude/ as CLAUDE.md documents, meaning the workflows are not version-controlled with the project. Always-on hooks (impact-analysis-guard, prompt-understanding-guard, delegation-gate, incremental-lint) enforce causal chain analysis and fact-verification discipline via PreToolUse/PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit triggers. Tools_SlotSetUP provides Python-based cloning of external dependencies (slotExtensions-client framework + game-specific proto) via gameSetting.json configuration</learned>
  <completed>Full documentation audit delivered covering methodology, game specification, tooling, state machine architecture, and workflow infrastructure with complete file listings and configuration details</completed>
  <next_steps>Awaiting user direction on whether to proceed with concrete implementation planning (opening /dev-prd or /dev-design for a new slot machine), or examine specific implementation files (Game_Define.ts, GameView.ts, reel-fill-strategy skill) in detail</next_steps>
  <notes>The workflow location discrepancy (global vs project-local) has implications for reproducibility when forking this template repository. The uk-slot-state-machine.skill file is a 25KB ZIP archive containing 19 state templates and documentation, with source of truth at .kiro/skills/uk-slot-state-machine/ per project_skill_workflow.md conventions</notes>
</summary>
```
